overview.system_goal: Simulate Twitter-style multi-channel information diffusion: users receive tweets via algorithm feeds, social follow graph, search, and @/retweet/quote/reply notifications; LLM agents decide retweets, quotes, and replies under memory/activity/freshness/depth gates.
overview.environment_description: Shared content_pool of tweets with nested replies; mention_pool queues notifications per user; time advances in scheduled day slices with current_tweets windows; seed_root_tweet_ids frozen from initial env_data for hop-depth metrics.
overview.workflow_structure: Each step: EnvAgent StartEvent → UserAgent (exposure + self-memory) + Algorithm (sync tweets) → on-demand recommendation/search → propagation & mention side-effects → step advance.

design_concepts.interaction_patterns: Pull-based algorithm recommendations (GetAlgorithmRecomendationEvent), probabilistic social follow feed, mention delivery via mention_pool, optional search continuation, keep-following re-exposure.
design_concepts.communication_protocols: Propagation tweets and mention_pool updates use AddTweetEvent / MentionPoolUpdateEvent RPC to SimEnv (async, not in workflow graph). RecommendationSpreadingEvent / MentionSpreadingEvent mark handler completion.
design_concepts.decision_mechanisms: UserAgentGates: memory similarity, freshness, activity level, TweetDepthGate vs seed_root_tweet_ids, interaction threshold sampling; LLM JSON decisions for retweet/quote/reply/@/search/keep-following.
design_concepts.execution_flow: StartEvent → get_exposure_stream ∥ generate_memory_from_own_tweets; StartEvent → Algorithm.update_current_tweets; exposure → {AlgorithmRecommendationEvent|SocialRecommendationEvent|KeepFollowingEvent|SearchResultEvent} → receive_recommendation; exposure → MentionEvent → handle_mention

details.agent_behaviors: UserAgent scans follow feed since last_login_timestamp, requests algorithm types from params, processes mention_pool with attention_budget cap, and runs receive_recommendation / handle_mention with chunked LLM calls. Algorithm agents run random/popularity/interest recommenders and relevant search.
details.decision_algorithms: Popularity: propagation_count distribution + rolling popularity; Random: MAU-weighted sampling; Interest: embedding similarity + candidate_tweet_ids_by_user; Search: embedding relevance to query.
details.specific_constraints: current_tweets = tweets with time < min(current_timestamp + timestamp_duration, simulation_cap); replies in prompts truncated; simulation capped by max_span_days and max_step from params; pure retweets excluded from text-diversity metrics.
details.process_sequence: 1) Load content_pool & profiles; 2) For each step broadcast StartEvent; 3) User exposure + memory; 4) Algorithm/on-demand feeds; 5) LLM propagation decisions → content_pool & mention_pool; 6) Mention handling; 7) Advance timestamp, rebuild current_tweets, save channel snapshots & metrics.

agent_types.UserAgent: Twitter user with profile (nickname, interest_tags, activity_level, follow_ids/fan_ids), memory, recommended_tweet_ids_by_channel, mentioned_tweet_ids_by_channel, keep_following_tweet_ids.
agent_types.Algorithm: Platform recommender/search agents: recomment_agent_0001 (random), recomment_agent_0002 (popularity), recomment_agent_0003 (interest), search_agent_0001 (relevant search).

metrics.name: Diffusion Generation Over Time
metrics.description: Counts propagation-only tweets in content_pool: retweets, quotes, and replies (any parent/ref id set). Original tweets are excluded.
metrics.calculation_logic: Count content_pool entries with any of retweeted_tweet_id, quoted_tweet_id, replied_tweet_id/replyed_tweet_id set.

metrics.name: Direct Tweet Pool Count Over Time
metrics.description: Counts non-secondary propagation tweets: parent tweet must be original (no retweet/quote/reply parent refs).
metrics.calculation_logic: Propagation tweets whose immediate parent is an original tweet.

metrics.name: Direct Retweet Count Over Time
metrics.calculation_logic: retweeted_tweet_id set and parent tweet is original.

metrics.name: Direct Quote Count Over Time
metrics.calculation_logic: quoted_tweet_id set and parent tweet is original.

metrics.name: Direct Reply Count Over Time
metrics.calculation_logic: replied_tweet_id/replyed_tweet_id set and parent tweet is original.

metrics.name: Diffusion Volume Real Time
metrics.description: Propagation tweets by tweet time: cumulative count + histogram (_viz_kind repost_realtime).
metrics.calculation_logic: Collect propagation tweet timestamps via time_to_ms; twin-panel export in monitor.

metrics.name: User Diffusion Count Frequency
metrics.description: Distribution of seed-attributed propagation entries per user; denominator = all tweet authors in content_pool.
metrics.calculation_logic: Histogram of per-user propagation totals; raw_data._viz_kind user_repost_count_freq_bar.

metrics.name: Root Diffusion Count Frequency
metrics.description: Distribution of propagation nodes under each env seed root tweet.
metrics.calculation_logic: Histogram of per-seed-root descendant counts; raw_data._viz_kind root_repost_count_freq_bar.

metrics.name: Diffusion Hop Depth Over Time
metrics.description: Count propagation tweets by hop depth vs env seed roots (series hop_1, hop_2, ...).
metrics.calculation_logic: Parent walk retweet → quote → reply until seed_root_tweet_ids; monitor splits hop panels.

metrics.name: Root Author Self-Repost Behavior
metrics.description: Per seed-root author: root_post_count, self_repost_hop_k, repost_on_others_count; CSV + JSONL under root_author_self_repost_behavior/.
metrics.calculation_logic: Returns {users: [...]} table; monitor writes CSV and snapshots.jsonl.

metrics.name: User Received Propagation Frequency
metrics.description: Distribution of one-hop incoming propagation events per user (any parent edge in content_pool); denominator = pool authors.
metrics.calculation_logic: Count propagation tweets pointing at each author's tweet; raw_data._viz_kind received_propagation_freq_bar.

metrics.name: Received Propagation Count Frequency
metrics.description: Dual chart: seed-root descendant counts + seed-attributed one-hop received counts per user (_viz_kind received_propagation_count_freq_bar).
metrics.calculation_logic: Combined root + user received histograms for twin PNG export.

metrics.name: Text Similarity
metrics.description: Mean BGE cosine similarity between generated quote/reply texts and root tweet reference embeddings.
metrics.calculation_logic: Embed generated texts; align to root tweet_id in reference embedding JSON; return mean cosine or None.

metrics.name: Text Diversity
metrics.description: Lexical/semantic diversity of generated quote/reply texts: TTR, Distinct-2/3, 1-Self-BLEU, Div_sem. Pure retweets excluded.
metrics.calculation_logic: Collect quote/reply texts; compute diversity metrics; embed via embedding_client; _viz_kind propagation_diversity.

metrics.name: Text Max Reference Similarity
metrics.description: Reference-driven max cosine: each reference quote/reply vs same-root simulated texts, then mean over matched references.
metrics.calculation_logic: Load reference reposts.csv by root tweet id; embed reference & generated texts; mean of max cosine per reference row.
